hub.dtt_desc.en: Discrete Trial Training — trial-by-trial recording with mastery criteria and auto-advance
hub.dtt_desc.tr: Discrete Trial Training: ການບັນທຶກເທື່ອລະການທົດສອບພ້ອມເງື່ອນໄຂການເຮັດໄດ້ຊຳນານ ແລະ ການກ້າວໜ້າອັດຕະໂນມັດ

hub.prefassess_desc.en: Systematic reinforcer identification — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, and Free Operant protocols
hub.prefassess_desc.tr: ການລະບຸຕົວເສີມແຮງຢ່າງເປັນລະບົບ: ໂປຣໂຕຄອນ MSWO, Paired Stimulus, ແລະ Free Operant

hub.snapshot_desc.en: Export & import JSON snapshots for parent–teacher data exchange
hub.snapshot_desc.tr: Export & import JSON snapshots for parent,teacher data exchange

fidelity_tip_2.tr: ໃຫ້ BST ເພີ່ມເຕີມ (Behavioral Skills Training)

toast.quick_fill_n_items_loaded.tr: Quick Fill: ໂຫລດ N ລາຍການແລ້ວ ⚡

toast.report_generated_use_printsave_as_.en: Report generated — use Print/Save as PDF in the new tab!
toast.report_generated_use_printsave_as_.tr: ສ້າງລາຍງານແລ້ວ: ໃຊ້ Print/Save as PDF ໃນແທັບໃໝ່!

toast.share_code_too_large.en: Snapshot too large for share code (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} chars, limit 5,000). Use 💾 Download Snapshot instead.
toast.share_code_too_large.tr: Snapshot ໃຫຍ່ເກີນໄປສຳລັບລະຫັດແບ່ງປັນ (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} ຕົວອັກສອນ, ຂີດຈຳກັດ 5,000). ໃຊ້ແທນດ້ວຍ 💾 ດາວໂຫຼດ Snapshot.

ui.based_on_horner_salentine_albin_2003.tr: ອີງຕາມ Horner, Salentine, & Albin (2003)

ui.click_load_student_workspaces_and_sel.en: Click "Load Student Workspaces" and select multiple .json files saved from BehaviorLens
ui.click_load_student_workspaces_and_sel.tr: ຄລິກ "Load Student Workspaces" ແລະ ເລືອກໄຟລ໌ .json ຫລາຍໄຟລ໌ທີ່ບັນທຶກຈາກ BehaviorLens
